response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience, strong TypeScript and React skills, and deep knowledge of scalable architectures, aligning well with the role's requirements. However, his background leans toward senior/lead roles with niche technologies (e.g., D language) rather than pragmatic fullstack development in renewable energy/construction tech. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure may not directly translate to the platform's needs. On-site presence requirement and industry fit are also points of concern.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and scalable architectures
Proven ability to lead and architect complex projects (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
Strong learning agility and focus on clean software design
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level role; may lack hands-on experience with PostgreSQL and Nest.js
Industry focus (AI, embedded systems) does not align closely with renewable energy/construction tech
Limited recent experience with relational databases (MongoDB used historically; no clear PostgreSQL exposure)
